description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OSW-FEATURE-test that runs on workflow dispatch, push, and pull requests to master and develop branches. The workflow has two jobs: Find-feature and build-OSW. The Find-feature job checks out the repository, extracts feature flags, default models, and languages, and outputs them as JSON. The build-OSW job depends on Find-feature, uses the extracted outputs to create a matrix of features, models, and languages, and builds the project using PlatformIO and Python.
